title: pgstat — Alerts & SLO
description: Alert hacmi, en gurultuluve alert kodlari, MTTA, MTTR, bildirim kanal basari orani.

list.name: service_group
list.query: select distinct service_group from control.instance_inventory where service_group is not null order by 1
list.label: Service Group

targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from ops.alert a left join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.status = 'open' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select count(*) as value from ops.alert a left join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(a.first_seen_at) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)
select round(avg(extract(epoch from acknowledged_at - first_seen_at) / 60)::numeric, 1) as value from ops.alert where acknowledged_at is not null and $__timeFilter(first_seen_at)
select round(avg(extract(epoch from resolved_at - first_seen_at) / 60)::numeric, 1) as value from ops.alert where resolved_at is not null and $__timeFilter(first_seen_at)
select $__timeGroupAlias(first_seen_at, $__interval), severity as metric, count(*) as value from ops.alert where $__timeFilter(first_seen_at) group by 1, severity order by 1
select alert_code, count(*) as value from ops.alert where $__timeFilter(first_seen_at) group by alert_code order by value desc limit 10

select a.alert_id, a.severity, a.alert_code, i.display_name as instance, a.first_seen_at, a.last_seen_at, a.occurrence_count, left(a.title, 100) as title from ops.alert a left join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.status = 'open' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by case a.severity when 'critical' then 1 when 'error' then 2 when 'warning' then 3 else 4 end, a.first_seen_at desc limit 200

select channel_type, count(*) as total, count(*) filter (where status = 'sent') as success, count(*) filter (where status != 'sent') as failed, round(100.0 * count(*) filter (where status = 'sent')::numeric / nullif(count(*), 0), 1) as success_rate from ops.notification_log where $__timeFilter(sent_at) group by channel_type order by total desc
select sent_at, channel_type, status, alert_id from ops.notification_log where $__timeFilter(sent_at) order by sent_at desc limit 50
